<!--
Thank you for sending a patch.

Quick checklist:
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes locally.
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes.
- [ ] If the public API surface changed, CHANGELOG.md has an entry.
- [ ] Doc comments on new public symbols are real "why" comments, not just "what".
- [ ] If the change affects performance, docs/PERFORMANCE.md is updated or there's a note in the PR.
-->

## What this changes

A short description.

## Why

Briefly: what problem this solves or what it improves.

## Anything reviewers should know

Edge cases, design tradeoffs you considered, alternative approaches you rejected.

## Public API impact

- [ ] No public API change.
- [ ] Additive: new function / type / method on existing surface.
- [ ] Breaking: requires `v0.X.0` bump and CHANGELOG callout.
